title: chore: drop stale balance scope references after #10360
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Sweeping up the balance dust
gist.blurb: Cleaned up some lingering references to the old balance scope in our CLI and SDK. Just keeping the hive tidy!
gist.summary: Removed stale references to the deprecated 'balance' scope across the CLI, SDK, and OpenAPI documentation.
gist.impact: Developers will see accurate scope requests and response examples when using the CLI and SDK.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot sweeping up dust or old code snippets with a broom. Nomnom creature eating old 'balance' documents.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny maid headband, sweeping up glowing old code snippets with a small broom. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a stack of papers labeled 'BALANCE'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
